# Helmdash

> The AI-powered cockpit for solo founders.

Helmdash is a unified dashboard designed specifically for indie hackers, bootstrappers, and solo founders. It replaces the scattered combination of Notion pages, spreadsheets, and disconnected LLMs with a single "workspace" where context is preserved.

## Core Value Proposition
- **Unified Context:** Finances, roadmap, hypotheses, and competitive intelligence live in one place.
- **Proactive AI Agent:** An integrated AI agent reads the founder's data, updates hypotheses, creates roadmap items, and helps make informed decisions without needing to be briefed on the context every time.
- **Focus:** No more juggling 15 tabs to remember why a decision was made.

## Key Features
- **Notion & CSV Imports:** Import existing data in 2 minutes.
- **Automated Logging:** The AI writes back to the dashboard, updating metrics and hypotheses.
- **Gamification:** Features like XP, streaks, and quests to keep solo founders motivated.
- **Pricing:** A BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) plan where founders can use their own OpenAI/Mistral keys without markup, or a Complete plan with AI included.

## Target Audience
- Indie Hackers
- Micro-SaaS founders
- Bootstrappers
- Solopreneurs

## Technical Details
- URL: https://helmdash.app
- Status: Waitlist / Launching September 15th

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://helmdash.app
